title: RNA Isolation from Plant Tissue Protocol 1: Qiagen RNeasy Plant Mini Kit
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"59evo","text":"Protocol implemented by: Jim Leebens-Mack and Charlotte Carrigan ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"58vpk","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"52pc","text":"The first protocol used for isolation of total RNA was Qiagen’s RNeasy Plant Mini Kit (Qiagen, Valencia, CA).
